name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake - Louise
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Louise Stankiewicz
1. Sift together the first six ingredients and set aside.
2. Cream together sugar, butter, and oil; add eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla. Mix well.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and mix until well combined.
4. Stir in the grated zucchini until fully blended.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9 x 13 pan.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the top of the batter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
